title: Ontario farmers embrace extreme heat after weeks of storms, hail damage crops
description: Farmers in southwestern Ontario say that weeks of extreme weather events, including torrential rain and hail, has made growing crops a challenge. Some say they're embracing a week of hot temperatures, which can help crops get healthy.
content:
Some southwestern Ontario farmers are celebrating as intense heat blankets the region, calling it a welcome change after an unpredictable start to the growing season. 
Last Thursday, a severe thunde… [+3781 chars]

Landwirte im Südwesten Ontarios sagen, dass wochenlange extreme Wetterereignisse, darunter sintflutartige Regenfälle und Hagel, den Pflanzenanbau zu einer Herausforderung gemacht haben. Einige sagen, dass sie sich auf eine Woche mit heißen Temperaturen freuen, was dazu beitragen kann, dass die Pflanzen gesund werden.
en: Ontario farmers embrace extreme heat after weeks of storms, hail damage crops. Farmers in southwestern Ontario say that weeks of extreme weather events, including torrential rain and hail, has made growing crops a challenge. Some say they're embracing a week of hot temperatures, which can help crops get healthy.
la: Ontario agricolae calorem maximum post septimanas tempestatum amplectuntur, grando fruges laedunt. Quidam dicunt se septem temperaturas calidas amplecti, quae adiuvant fruges sanos fieri.

en: Hail and thunderstorms end heat. Heavy rain showers and thunderstorms fell across large parts of Lower Austria on Wednesday afternoon. According to the fire department, the focus of the storm was in the St. Pölten and Tulln area in the early evening. There was a rescue in the Melk district.
la: Grando et tonitruum finiunt calorem. Imbres graves et tonitrua trans magnas partes Austriae inferioris die mercurii post meridiem ceciderunt. Secundum incendium, focus tempestatis in regione S. Polten et Tulln in prima vespera fuit. Subveniendum erat in regione Melk.

de: Unwetter zerstört 250-Jahr-Feier: National Mall evakuiert - Trumps Rede verschoben. Statt des von Trump versprochenen Feuerwerks ziehen Sturmwolken mit Blitz und Donner über Washington auf. Die Festmeile zur 250-Jahr-Feier wird geräumt, Tausende Besucher evakuiert. Der US-Präsident hält daran fest, seine Rede zu halten, egal wann.
en: Storm destroys 250th anniversary celebration: National Mall evacuated - Trump's speech postponed. Instead of the fireworks promised by Trump, storm clouds with lightning and thunder are gathering over Washington. The festival mile for the 250th anniversary is being cleared and thousands of visitors are being evacuated. The US President insists on giving his speech, no matter when.
la: Tempestas 250th anniversarium celebrationem destruit: emissus National Mall - oratio distulit Trump. Loco pomparum a Trump promissae, nimbi nimbi cum fulminibus et tonitruis Washingtoniae congregantur. Festum millesimi sexcentesimi anniversarii exinanitur et milia salutantium evacuantur. Praeses US insistit ut suam orationem praebeat, quacumque in re.
